families.description: All filings metadata for one company. CIK is 10-digit zero-padded. filings.recent holds parallel-array tables; filings.files points to older quarters.
Every reported XBRL fact for one company, grouped by taxonomy (us-gaap, dei).
A single XBRL concept across all filings for one company.
All companies' values for one concept in one period (frame).
Canonical company ticker indexes. See catalog.json.companies for the flattened list used to look up CIK by ticker.
